ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "debut_date" TEXT /* Date of the player's debut */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Current age of the player */,
  "years_played" INTEGER /* Total years the player has been active in professional basketball */,
  "retired" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is retired */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that drafted the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player to whom the statistics belong */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played in the season */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Total field goals attempted */,
  "threes_made" INTEGER /* Total three-point shots made */,
  "threes_attempted" INTEGER /* Total three-point shots attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Total free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Total free throws attempted */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total offensive rebounds */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds (offensive + defensive) */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Total personal fouls */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the season */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the statistics were recorded */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was part of during the season */,
  "advanced_metrics" TEXT /* JSON column to store advanced metrics */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the statistics record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player to whom the metrics belong */,
  "fg_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "threes_percentage" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage */,
  "ft_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "mp_pg" REAL /* Minutes played per game */,
  "pts_pg" REAL /* Points per game */,
  "trb_pg" REAL /* Total rebounds per game */,
  "ast_pg" REAL /* Assists per game */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the metrics were calculated */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was part of during the season */,
  "advanced_metrics" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional performance metrics */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance metrics record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League where the team plays */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home arena */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "pt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-team association */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the player was part of the team */,
  "is_current_team" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is currently part of the team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player-team association record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee for the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the game record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistical entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds made by the player in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player in the game */,
  "threes_made" INTEGER /* Three-point shots made by the player in the game */,
  "threes_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-point shots attempted by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player in the game */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Personal fouls committed by the player in the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the game statistics record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role in the system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
